title: hypogomphia elatior
intro: Hypogomphia elatior, also known as the Himalayan lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Hypogomphia elatior include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Hypogomphia elatior include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
